dependencies: Dependent on third party suppliers for components including semiconductors, liquid crystal displays, memory chips, batteries and microprocessors
Some components procured from sole source suppliers
Principal manufacturing facilities for consumer products located in Taiwan
Reliance on GPS satellite system operated by United States Department of Defense
Dependence on Iridium satellite network for certain product features
Reliance on licensed technology and content from third parties
risks: Shortages of certain components and delays in procuring components
Increase in costs of procuring components during shortages
Inability to obtain components from alternative sources if suppliers unable to meet demand
Extended disruptions at single or limited source suppliers could impact ability to meet customer demand
Supply chain constraints affecting production schedules
Dependence on third party suppliers and licensors for technology and components

regulatory_risks: FAA certification required for aviation products - delays could harm business
FCC certification required for wireless transceiver products
European Commission directives compliance required for products sold in Europe
Decertification risk for certified aviation products
Government shutdown or FAA furloughs could delay required certifications

Complex and changing global laws and regulations including telecommunications, environmental, health and safety, labor and employment, intellectual property, antitrust, data privacy and security, consumer protection, product liability, anticorruption, import/export/trade, foreign exchange controls, anti-money laundering, and tax
GDPR compliance requirements in European Union
Data protection laws in United States and internationally with significant penalties
Extended producer responsibility laws requiring collection, recovery, and recycling of electronic products
Environmental laws addressing air and water pollution and hazardous substances management
Laws relating to chemical and material composition of products and energy efficiency
OECD BEPS recommendations including global minimum tax rate of 15%
Switzerland cantonal tax rate increase to approximately 15% combined federal and cantonal rate
Changes to trade regulations including sanctions, tariffs, or duties
U.S. tariffs on imports from China and potential retaliatory measures
Customs authorities review of product classifications affecting tariffs and duties
Radar altimeter products subject to potential harmful interference from 5G systems near airports
ITU and national reallocation of radio frequency spectrum could affect product utility
Transfer pricing subjectivity and advanced pricing agreement requirements

sanction_risks: Restrictions on international trade such as sanctions, tariffs, duties and other governmental controls
U.S. and China trade tensions leading to series of tariffs
Potential for other countries to impose similar trade restriction measures
Risk of selective or inconsistent application of sanctions, tariffs or duties
Taiwan geopolitical risk - PRC assertion of sovereignty and potential military action
Risk that PRC government may unilaterally seek to occupy Taiwan by force
Potential disruptions to manufacturing facilities and suppliers in Taiwan due to PRC actions
U.S.-China relations governed by 'one-China' policy - deviations could adversely affect Taiwan operations
Changes in U.S.-China relations could influence China-Taiwan relations
